title: Agenda Item Schema
description: Schema for specific discussion entries associated with a parent meeting agenda.

id.description: Unique deterministic string identifier for the agenda item.

meeting_id.description: Reference ID matching the corresponding record in meetings.jsonl.

schema_version.description: Semantic versioning string (e.g., 1.0.0) mapping to this contract.

title.description: The title or subject statement of the agenda item.

sequence.description: Zero-indexed integer order for rendering layout sorts cleanly.
